vpop_ballad.rhythm: slow 4/4, gentle backbeat, emotional piano foundation
vpop_ballad.mix: warm vocal-space mix without lead vocal

cinematic_pop.rhythm: steady cinematic pulse with modern pop clarity

lofi_memory.rhythm: soft dusty beat, relaxed swing, gentle repetition
lofi_memory.mix: warm tape noise, rounded transients, intimate space

dark_cinematic.rhythm: driving minor pulse, tight percussion, controlled dramatic build
dark_cinematic.mix: punchy wide mix without clipping, dark low-end control

upbeat_pop.rhythm: clear pop groove, light drums, optimistic guitar strums
upbeat_pop.mix: clean, bright, friendly, energetic but not harsh
